description_long: This object is a futuristic, military-style airplane with a complex, segmented fuselage and multiple wing surfaces. The main body features a forward cockpit with a clear canopy, followed by a midsection that appears to house engines and mechanical components. The wings are swept back with additional smaller winglets and stabilizers, giving the aircraft a highly angular and aggressive profile. At the rear, there are multiple jet exhausts and vertical stabilizers, suggesting high-speed capability and advanced maneuverability. The surface is predominantly metallic gray with some darker and lighter accents, and the overall design is reminiscent of advanced fighter jets or science fiction spacecraft. The airplane's structure is robust, with visible panel lines, intakes, and mechanical details.
description: A futuristic, angular military-style airplane with swept wings, multiple stabilizers, and a segmented metallic fuselage. Features a forward cockpit, prominent jet exhausts, and detailed mechanical surfaces.
description_view_0: Rear view showing twin jet exhausts, swept wings, and multiple vertical stabilizers.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the elongated fuselage, forward cockpit, and complex engine section.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the pointed nose, cockpit canopy, and layered wing structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile with visible mechanical details and wing configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept main wings, additional forward canards, and multiple small winglets; pronounced anhedral angles and complex stabilizer arrangement.
attribute_engine_type: Four rear-mounted jet engines integrated into the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with a conventional tailplane and additional ventral fins.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with visible main and nose gear bays.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy and multi-panel windows.
